---
author:
  - name: Serkan Korkmaz
    orcid: 0000-0002-5052-0982
    email: ser@econ.ku.dk
    phone: +45 33 48 09 69
    degrees: Ph.D.-student
    affiliations:
      - name: The University of Copenhagen
        address:  Øster Farimagsgade 5, Building 35
        city: Copenhagen K
        postal-code: 1353
      - name: The Danish Center for Social Science Research
        address: Herluf Trolles Gade 11
        city: Copenhagen K
        postal-code: 1052
bibliography: references.bib
nocite: |
  @olsen2020nonsedation; @nedergaard2020effect; @zwiers2025remote; @olsen2021non; @nedergaard2022failure
---

## About me

```json
{
  "about_me": {
    "name": "Serkan Korkmaz",
    "birth year": 1989     
    },
    
  "research_interests": [
    "Inequality",
    "Applied Econometrics",
    "Health Economics"
    ]
}
```

I am a Ph.D.-student at the Center for Economic Behavior and Inequality (CEBI). My primary research interest is in studying inequality across Economic domains.

### Open-source contributions

```json
{
  "R_packages": [
    "cryptoQuotes",
    "SLmetrics",
    "talib"
  ]
}
```

Visit my [{Github}](https://github.com/serkor1)- or [{Gitlab}](https://gitlab.com/serkor1)-profile for more information.

## Publications

::: {#refs}
:::
